summary: Iter 166 (Resigned-employee exclusion from salary processing + Employee-Status filter chips on /admin) fully verified. Backend: 4/4 pytest cases pass — _month_is_after_exit helper unit-checked (exit 2026-06-15 → 2026-07 excluded, 2026-06 included); COMPLIANCE run 2026-07 correctly OMITS user_44cd6f561da0 (SURENDRA SINGH) while keeping the other 125 employees; COMPLIANCE run 2026-06 (exit month = final settlement) INCLUDES him; Actual Salary Process 2026-07 (with firm offline_salary flipped True temporarily) also excludes him. Frontend: three new chips render on /admin with correct testIDs (status-filter-active/-resigned/-all); ACTIVE (default) hides SURENDRA, RESIGN EMPLOYEE surfaces only him with a red 'RESIGNED · 2026-06-15' pill, ALL EMPLOYEE shows him alongside active staff; existing Type + On/Off-roll chip rows still render and remain interactive. All Mongo mutations (exit_date on target user, firm salary_process.offline_salary flag) restored and every run created during testing deleted — DB left pristine.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py — _month_is_after_exit at line 10103 uses `datetime.fromisoformat(str(ed)[:10])` which will fail (→ False) on any DD-MM-YYYY string. Kankani's DOJ column is stored as DD-MM-YYYY (e.g. '01-12-2018'). If HR ever writes exit_date/resign_date in that same legacy format, the helper silently returns False and the employee will NOT be excluded. Consider normalising through the existing date parser or emitting a warning when exit_date fails to parse (non-blocking; UI writes ISO strings).

server.py — /admin/actual-salary-process (line 18500) applies BOTH _month_is_after_exit AND the older _still_active(exit_date > last-day-of-month). Consistent for exit dates at/after month-start but _still_active is now redundant with the new helper. Consider consolidating for readability (non-blocking).

admin.tsx isResigned() considers only exit_date + resign_date + string employment_status. If someone toggles employment_status without setting exit_date, the frontend pill will render without a date suffix — spec-compliant, just worth noting.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily set exit_date='2026-06-15' on user_44cd6f561da0 and flipped firm_masters.cmp_527fecdd7c.salary_process.offline_salary to True for the actual-salary test. Both restored to their original values in module-teardown; UI-phase exit_date also cleaned up post-run. All compliance_salary_runs and salary_runs generated during this iteration deleted via tracked run_ids.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 166 backend gate lives in _month_is_after_exit (server.py ~10103) applied at 3 sites (~13394 compliance _compute_compliance_run, ~14397 comp2, ~18504 actual-salary-process). Semantics: exit month itself remains PAYABLE (final settlement); every later month is excluded. Frontend list gate in /app/frontend/app/admin.tsx uses statusFilter state driving three chips testIDs status-filter-{active|resigned|all}; resigned pill styling is styles.resignedPill/resignedPillTxt. To retest with fresh data: set/unset exit_date directly on any employee doc, log in via /api/auth/admin-password-login (email+password), inject session_token as localStorage 'llc_session_token', navigate to /admin.
rca_of_issue: N/A — implementation matched spec; no bugs found.
